key_findings.A_statements: All are direct measurements or procedures.
key_findings.B_statements: Inferences from measurements. May be contaminated.
key_findings.C_statements: True for models, not proven for observation.
key_findings.D_statements: Underdetermined. Cannot be resolved with current evidence.

Distinction can emerge from pure \u03a9.to_C: A detector that does not import distinction successfully detects it.
Distinction can emerge from pure \u03a9.to_B: Multiple independent assumption-free detectors agree on distinction emergence.

The first stable structure is trajectory.to_C: Assumption-free detectors confirm trajectory bundles as first structure.
The first stable structure is trajectory.to_B: Multiple independent detector families agree on trajectory bundles.

Recurrence is the first emergent structu.to_C: Recurrence survives all audits with clean detectors.
Recurrence is the first emergent structu.to_B: Recurrence is confirmed by multiple independent detector families.

Convergence is genuine.to_C: Convergence detectors pass full assumption audit.
Convergence is genuine.to_B: Convergence is confirmed by assumption-free detectors.

Convergence is fundamental.to_C: Convergence appears without any imported primitives.
Convergence is fundamental.to_B: Convergence is confirmed by assumption-free detectors and beats all nulls.

Nothing exists below distinction.to_C: Exhaustive search of all possible substrates.
Nothing exists below distinction.to_B: Strong evidence from diverse candidate tests.

All five primitives are necessary for ob.to_C: Observation is proven to require each primitive (not just models).
All five primitives are necessary for ob.to_B: Strong evidence from diverse observation scenarios.
